add_one_stick: Which labeled number can be made from the Source number by adding exactly one stick?
Add one stick to the Source number. Which option shows a reachable number?
Select the candidate number that can be formed by adding exactly one stick to the Source.
Use one added stick to change the Source number. Which labeled option is possible?
Choose the option reachable from the Source number after adding exactly one stick.
remove_one_stick: Which labeled number can be made from the Source number by removing exactly one stick?
Remove one stick from the Source number. Which option shows a reachable number?
Select the candidate number that can be formed by removing exactly one stick from the Source.
Use one removed stick to change the Source number. Which labeled option is possible?
Choose the option reachable from the Source number after removing exactly one stick.
single: Which labeled stick should be removed to make the equation true?
Remove exactly one labeled stick. Which label makes the equation true?
Select the labeled stick whose removal repairs the equation.
Which labeled matchstick can be removed so the equation becomes correct?
Choose the one labeled stick to remove so the equation is true.
max_square_count_after_additions: You may add exactly {stick_count} matchsticks to empty grid edges. What is the maximum number of complete unit squares that can be present?
Add exactly {stick_count} matchsticks to empty edge positions. What is the largest possible number of complete unit squares?
Using exactly {stick_count} added matchsticks, what is the maximum count of complete unit squares in the lattice?
Place exactly {stick_count} more matchsticks on empty grid edges. How many complete unit squares can there be at most?
If exactly {stick_count} matchsticks are added to empty lattice edges, what is the greatest possible number of complete unit squares?

task:equation_repair_stick_label_query.object_description: a false matchstick equation with labeled digit sticks
task:equation_repair_stick_label_query.answer_hint: Set answer to the single option label as a capital letter.
task:equation_repair_stick_label_query.annotation_hint: Set annotation to the selected stick segment in image pixels as [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], using the centerline endpoints of that stick.

task:max_square_count_after_additions_va.object_description: a matchstick square lattice with some empty grid edges
task:max_square_count_after_additions_va.answer_hint: Set answer to the maximum number of complete unit squares that can be present.
task:max_square_count_after_additions_va.annotation_hint: Set annotation to a bbox_set in image pixels, one bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1] for each complete unit square counted in the final board.

task:matchstick_number_transform_query.object_description: a Source matchstick number and six labeled candidate numbers
task:matchstick_number_transform_query.answer_hint: Set answer to the single option label as a capital letter.
task:matchstick_number_transform_query.annotation_hint: Set annotation to a bbox_map in image pixels with keys source_number and selected_option. Each key maps to one bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1].
